locations_inspected.name: Lone Star Property Holdings, LP
findings: 6 control valves inspected; all found in open position
Sprinkler heads in fair visual condition with minor corrosion observed
Spare sprinkler heads available in cabinet with adequate supply
Water supply readings: static pressure 42 psi, residual pressure 49 psi, flow 1029 GPM
deficiencies: Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: Remove or relocate combustible storage to maintain at least 18 inches of clearance below sprinkler deflectors.
Correct exposed wiring and install missing junction box covers in the main electrical room.

overall_assessment.summary: Fire protection system inspection identified a 20-year-old Reliable dry pipe sprinkler system that is NFPA 13 compliant, has operational alarm devices, adequate water supply, and an overall system status of PASS. The overall risk grade was Below Average, with deficiencies noted for sprinkler clearance and electrical conditions.
